center.name: Kanashen
center.summary: Kanashen是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Black-bellied cuckoo，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is a permanent resident in its range. In Guyana, the black-bellied cuckoo can be found in Kanashen. In Bolivia it can be found in the department of La Paz. In Colombia it is found from the south of Meta department, the northwest of Guainía department and in southern Vaupés department. In Ecuador it is found below 400 meter above sea level, is infrequently seen in the eastern lowlands. In Brasil this cuckoo is found in the Alta Floresta region at the north of Mato Grosso, in southeastern Amazonia
